description: The database is an independent database within a PostgreSQL instance, used to store and manage data.

CType.description: Character classification. Supported values: C (default), C.UTF-8, en_US.utf8, zh_CN.utf8, and POSIX

CharacterSetName.description: Database character set. Supported character sets: utf8 (default), latin1, ascii

Collate.description: Collation. Supported values: C (default), C.UTF-8, en_US.utf8, zh_CN.utf8, and POSIX

DBName.description: Database name. Naming rules: Length must be 2–63 characters. Can contain letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens. Must start with a letter and end with a letter or number. Reserved keywords are not allowed. For a list of all disabled keywords, see Disabled Keywords.

DBStatus.description: Database status: Unavailable: Not available. Available: Available.

Owner.description: Database owner. Note: Read-only instance accounts, high-privilege accounts with DDL permissions disabled, or regular accounts with DDL permissions disabled cannot be set as the database owner. If no value is provided or the value is empty, this field defaults to rds superuser
